title: Add ssh parameter support for image builds
body:
Allow passing SSH agent sockets or keys to the build API, similar to the existing secrets parameter support.
Fixes: https://github.com/containers/podman-py/issues/602

comments.body: @sowmya-sl thanks for the PR, please sign your commit as DCO bot says
@inknos Let me know if anything needs to be added from the server side.
